title: RNA Isolation from Plant Tissue Using CTAB-Hot Acid Phenol Method
author: Unknown
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4uygwxw
materials: Invert tubes and air dry at room temperature.
Extract once with hot acid phenol.

steps.title: Preheat phenol and phenol:chloroform to 65 °C
steps.instruction: Preheat phenol and phenol:chloroform to 65 °C . Heated phenol should not be re-used.

steps.title: Collect algae cells via centrifugation for...
steps.instruction: Collect algae cells via centrifugation for 00:10:00 at at Room temperature .

steps.title: Re-suspend the frozen pellet in 800...
steps.instruction: Re-suspend the frozen pellet in 800 µL of preheated extraction buffer .

steps.title: Incubate at 65 °C for 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65 °C for 01:00:00 . Gently vortex every 00:15:00 .

steps.title: Cool to Room temperature
steps.instruction: Cool to Room temperature .

steps.title: Collect the aqueous phase by centrifuging...
steps.instruction: Collect the aqueous phase by centrifuging for 00:10:00 in micro-centrifuge at at Room temperature .

steps.title: Collect aqueous phase and re-extract with...
steps.instruction: Collect aqueous phase and re-extract with an equal volume of chloroform.

steps.title: Collect aqueous phase and add 10...
steps.instruction: Collect aqueous phase and add 10 Molarity (M) LiCl to a final concentration of 3 Molarity (M) .

steps.title: Recover the RNA by centrifugation at...
steps.instruction: Recover the RNA by centrifugation at at 4 °C for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Dissolve pellet in DEPC treated water
steps.instruction: Dissolve pellet in DEPC treated water.

steps.title: Extract the aqueous phase with equal volume of phenol:chloroform (5:1)
steps.instruction: Extract the aqueous phase with equal volume of phenol:chloroform (5:1).

steps.title: Vortex for 00:01:00 at Room temperature
steps.instruction: Vortex for 00:01:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Extract the aqueous phase with equal volume of chloroform
steps.instruction: Extract the aqueous phase with equal volume of chloroform.

steps.title: Collect aqueous phase and add 1/30...
steps.instruction: Collect aqueous phase and add 1/30 volume of 3 Molarity (M) sodium acetate pH 5.5 and 0.1 volume of 100 % ethanol.

steps.title: To the clear supernatant add 3...
steps.instruction: To the clear supernatant add 3 Molarity (M) sodium acetate pH 5.2 to a final concentration of 0.3 Molarity (M) and 3 volumes of 100 % ethanol.

steps.title: Spin in micro-centrifuge at 4 °C...
steps.instruction: Spin in micro-centrifuge at 4 °C at top speed for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Wash the pellet with 70 % ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet with 70 % ethanol.

steps.title: Resuspend pellets in 50 µL of DEPC treated water
steps.instruction: Resuspend pellets in 50 µL of DEPC treated water.

steps.title: Flash freeze pellets with liquid nitrogen...
steps.instruction: Flash freeze pellets with liquid nitrogen and keep at -80 °C until extractions are carried out.

steps.title: Add equal volume of chloroform
steps.instruction: Add equal volume of chloroform.

steps.title: Shake vigorously until 2 phases form an emulsion
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously until 2 phases form an emulsion.

steps.title: Centrifuge as above
steps.instruction: Centrifuge as above.

steps.title: Allow the RNA to precipitate at 4 °C overnight
steps.instruction: Allow the RNA to precipitate at 4 °C overnight.

steps.title: Spin for 00:05:00 in a micro-centrifuge at top speed
steps.instruction: Spin for 00:05:00 in a micro-centrifuge at top speed.

steps.title: Mix well and keep on ice for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Mix well and keep on ice for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Centrifuge in cold for 00:25:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge in cold for 00:25:00 .

steps.title: A white jelly-like pellet consisting mostly...
steps.instruction: A white jelly-like pellet consisting mostly of polysaccharides is obtained and discarded.

steps.title: Allow the RNA to precipitate at...
steps.instruction: Allow the RNA to precipitate at -80 °C for 03:00:00 to overnight.
